---
name: Template request
description: Request a new non-sensitive message template
title: "Template request: "
labels: [template]
---

## Template type

Examples: follow-up, appointment, housing, benefits, finance, education, complaint, written communication request.

## Purpose

What should the template help with?

## Required sections

List headings or wording that should be included.

## Privacy check

Do not include private case details, official numbers, addresses, phone numbers, or confidential records.
